name: @meu-jarvis/tools
description: Tool Registry Foundation — contrato `ToolDefinition<I,O>`, `ToolRegistry` singleton, `executeAtomic` com persistência declarativa de `ReverseOpPayload` em `agent_reverse_ops` (FR6 undo 30s), taxonomia de erros PT-PT e OTel tracing whitelist (NFR12). Source-only. Consumido pelas Stories 2.5 (Planner+Executor) e 2.6 (endpoint /api/agent/prompt).
